po.name: Product Owner
po.desc: Define WHAT gets built — discovery, scope, requirements

pm.name: Project Manager
pm.desc: Manage HOW it gets built — plan, execute, track, ship

front.name: Frontend
front.desc: Build the UI — design contracts, visual review

back.name: Backend
back.desc: Build the logic — debug, maintain, context

verbs.new: Start a new project or milestone
verbs.define: Define scope, context, and requirements for a phase
verbs.inbox: Triage issues, PRs, and backlog items
verbs.manage: Pause, resume, toggle skills, and get help
verbs.ui: Generate UI design contracts and visual specs
verbs.maintain: Keep docs, learnings, and artifacts up to date
verbs.validate: Validate phases, verify implementations, run health checks
verbs.audit: Audit milestones, UAT gaps, and fixes
verbs.review: Code review, peer review, security review, backlog review
